genuineBrowserZoom.transport: dedicated Helium UI on CDP port 9224
genuineBrowserZoom.method: Activated the dedicated Helium window and used the real browser chrome shortcuts Control+0 and Control+Plus x5; no device-scale-factor, Page.setPageScaleFactor, Emulation.setDeviceMetricsOverride, screenshot scaling, Chrome Hawkeye, Edge, Brave, or Native Chrome.

before.instruction: LISTEN FOR THE NOTE -> PRESS THE MATCHING KEY (OR TAP ITS BUTTON)

during.instruction: LISTEN FOR THE NOTE -> PRESS THE MATCHING KEY (OR TAP ITS BUTTON)

genuineBrowserZoom.screenshotCaveat: The CDP page screenshot is cropped by the DPR-2 browser-zoom capture surface. Acceptance is based on genuine UI shortcut telemetry plus zero-overflow DOM geometry, not the cropped screenshot alone.

embeddedZoomProbe.method: Helium browser keyboard accelerator Control+Equal x5; no DSF or page-scale emulation

voiceReadiness.fullText: VOICE DEFENSE UNITVOICE CHANNELPRE-FLIGHTRADIO CHECKHum or sing anything. We only need a fresh live signal - no target note, range judgment, or score.HUM OR SING ANYTHINGRETRY MICVOICE CHANNEL OPEN - hum or sing anything.BACK TO MENU
